DP.029.0000:
Someone broke my Pokémon-catching
record!\f
I’ll reclaim my record and regain
my place in the standings!
DP.029.0001:
My name isn’t on the rankings?
What kind of nonsense is that?!\f
...It’s because I’ve never taken
part in a Contest.\f
I bet it’d feel great if I could
be number one here!
DP.029.0002:
I really don’t win many battles...
But it doesn’t get me down.\f
I’m trying for the world record
at Pokémon fishing!
DP.029.0003:
Sorry, I’m still fine-tuning this
thingy here.
